mapper.select:
select * from nx_distributer_purchase_goods
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from nx_distributer_purchase_goods

select * from nx_distributer_purchase_goods as ndpg left join nx_distributer_goods as dg on dg.nx_distributer_goods_id = ndpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id where nx_DPG_buy_user_id = #{purUserId} and nx_DPG_status < 3 order by nx_DPG_dis_goods_id
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_distributer_purchase_goods where nx_distributer_purchase_goods_id in
#{nxDistributerPurchaseGoods}
mapper.select:
select -- 采购商品基本信息（只返回必要字段） ndpg.nx_distributer_purchase_goods_id, ndpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id, ndpg.nx_DPG_quantity, ndpg.nx_DPG_standard, ndpg.nx_DPG_status, ndpg.nx_DPG_orders_amount,
-- 商品基本信息（只返回必要字段） dg.nx_distributer_goods_id, dg.nx_dg_goods_name, dg.nx_dg_goods_standardname, dg.nx_dg_goods_standard_weight, dg.nx_dg_carton_unit, dg.nx_dg_goods_brand, dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id, great.nx_distributer_father_goods_id as great_nx_distributer_father_goods_id, great.nx_dfg_father_goods_name as great_nx_dfg_father_goods_name, great.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort as great_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_purchase_auto,
-- 订单基本信息（只返回必要字段） ndo.nx_department_orders_id, ndo.nx_DO_quantity, ndo.nx_DO_standard, ndo.nx_DO_weight, ndo.nx_DO_remark, ndo.nx_DO_print_standard, NULL as nx_DO_ds_standard_scale,
-- 扁平化的部门信息 CONCAT( CASE WHEN dd.nx_department_attr_name IS NOT NULL AND dd.nx_department_attr_name != '' THEN CONCAT(dd.nx_department_attr_name, '.') ELSE '' END, d.nx_department_attr_name ) AS dep_name,
-- 部门属性名称（单独返回） d.nx_department_attr_name as nx_department_attr_name,
-- 部门订货代号（单独返回） d.nx_department_order_code as nx_department_order_code,
-- 父部门属性名称（单独返回） dd.nx_department_attr_name as father_department_attr_name,
-- GB部门名称（扁平化字符串） CONCAT( CASE WHEN ngdf.gb_department_name IS NOT NULL AND ngdf.gb_department_name != '' THEN CONCAT(ngdf.gb_department_name, '.') ELSE '' END, ngds.gb_department_name ) AS gb_dep_name,
-- 餐厅名称 nr.nx_restraunt_attr_name AS restraunt_name
from nx_distributer_purchase_goods as ndpg left join nx_distributer_goods as dg on dg.nx_distributer_goods_id = ndpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as great on great.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_department_orders as ndo on ndpg.nx_distributer_purchase_goods_id = ndo.nx_DO_purchase_goods_id left join gb_department as ngds on ngds.gb_department_id = ndo.nx_DO_gb_department_id left join gb_department as ngdf on ngdf.gb_department_id = ndo.nx_DO_gb_department_father_id left join nx_department as d on d.nx_department_id = ndo.nx_DO_department_id left join nx_department as dd on d.nx_department_father_id = dd.nx_department_id left join nx_restraunt as nr on nr.nx_restraunt_id = ndo.nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_id
and ndpg.nx_DPG_distributer_id = #{disId}
and ndpg.nx_DPG_status < #{status}
and ndo.nx_do_purchase_status < #{orderPurStatus}
and ndpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id = #{goodsId}
and ndpg.nx_DPG_batch_id is null
and ndpg.nx_DPG_batch_id > 0
-- 按照曾祖父商品的排序字段作为第一排序字段，然后按曾祖父ID（确保相同ID的商品在一起）、爷爷商品、商品、部门排序 order by great.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, great.nx_distributer_father_goods_id, ndfg.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort, dd.nx_department_id
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
